title: begoniaceae
intro: The Begoniaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, also known as the begonia family. It is a group of approximately 1,800 species of plants, many of which are native to tropical regions around the world. The Begoniaceae family is characterized by its diverse range of plants, including annuals, perennials, and climbers, with various leaf shapes and flower colors. This family includes many popular ornamental plants, such as the popular houseplant, the begonia.
